message:
refactor: migrate dependency.rs and coverage.rs from std locks to parking_lot

Replace std::sync::{RwLock, Mutex} with parking_lot equivalents to
eliminate .expect("...poisoned") calls throughout:

dependency.rs:
- ResolutionStack now uses parking_lot::RwLock instead of std::sync::RwLock
- Removes 5 .expect("resolution stack poisoned") calls from check_cycle,
  check_scope_violation, push, pop, and depth methods
- parking_lot RwLock never poisons, so panicking threads in one dependency
  resolution don't permanently brick the stack for other requests

coverage.rs:
- CoverageTracker now uses parking_lot::Mutex instead of std::sync::Mutex
- Removes 3 .expect("coverage lock poisoned") calls from register_endpoint,
  register_endpoints, and record_hit methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
